title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Katakuri as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: His legs are all Wobbly Bobbly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's right, big brother. I. Did. It.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the most thoughtful of all the younger sisters. I'm cute, right? I'm definitely the one who will be favoured by the world's most perfect big brother!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give unwanted support in a duel between men!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DON'T COME NEAR ME!! DON'T TOUCH ME!! MONSTER!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're going to laugh at that idiot... then laugh at me, too....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ma... Master Katakuri!? Your face... is it cursed!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, God, you're so dirty!! There's blood all over you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you trying to achieve by piercing your own stomach...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone like you can not be big brother Katakuri!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your mouth is split all the way up to your ears... you look like a pelican Eel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop it, Miss Flampe! We won't be able to hold in our laughter....!!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 37 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
